'''Henk Lorin''' was an [[Office of Peace and Security]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] stationed in [[Gadrin]] with a very serious demeanor. While not happy with the [[Metatheran Cartel]]'s increased presence, she had reviewed their [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security]] [[Police officer/Legends|forces]] and found them to be competent.

{{Char-stub}}

*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}} {{1st}}
